achievements.title: The Womb of My Rebirth
achievements.description: Reach the Lake of the Dead
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: My Once-Proud Kin, Wiped from This World
achievements.description: Reach Razielim Clan territory
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: To What Depths Had Our Dynasty Plummeted?
achievements.description: Reach the Necropolis, Melchahim Clan territory
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: No Laughing Matter
achievements.description: Hit Melchiah in hand-to-hand combat such that he can't laugh it off
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Do You Not Recognize Me, Brother?
achievements.description: Consume the soul of Melchiah, earning the ability to phase through gates
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Dance with Death
achievements.description: Avoid a Soul Reaver attack whilst fighting Kain in Sanctuary of the Clans
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Soul Reaver and Reaver of Souls
achievements.description: Defeat Kain in Sanctuary of the Clans, earning the Soul Reaver
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Stifled Titan in Mute Surrender
achievements.description: Reach the Silenced Cathedral, Zephonim Clan territory
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: It Is You Who Must Succumb to My Will
achievements.description: Defeat Zephon without taking damage
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Your Visage Becomes You
achievements.description: Consume the soul of Zephon, earning the ability to scale walls
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Know Thyself, Though It May Destroy You
achievements.description: Uncover your past at the Tomb of the Sarafan
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Do You Prosper on the Scraps He Casts You?
achievements.description: Defeat the Tomb Guardian, earning the ability to shoot telekinetic projectiles
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Stagnant Depths
achievements.description: Reach the Drowned Abbey, Rahabim Clan territory
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: The Swift Hand of God
achievements.description: Defeat Rahab without letting him attack more than twice or entering the spectral plane
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: You Adapted Well, for One So Maladjusted
achievements.description: Consume the soul of Rahab, earning the ability to swim
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Complacent in Their Arrogance
achievements.description: Reach the Ruined City, abandoned Dumahim clan territory
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Come to Save My Soul?
achievements.description: Speak to Dumah before reviving him
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: You Are Persistent, Raziel
achievements.description: Defeat Dumah without getting stunned or entering the spectral plane - retries allowed
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Your Thanks Are Premature
achievements.description: Consume the soul of Dumah, earning the constrict ability
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: An Ancient Enigma
achievements.description: Gain access to the Oracle's Caves
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: You Cannot Have Foreseen All of This
achievements.description: Defeat Kain in the Chronoplast without letting him attack
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Welcome... to Your Destiny
achievements.description: Defeat Kain in the Chronoplast and follow your destiny
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Raziel the Space Streamer
achievements.description: After activating every Warp Gate, interact with one of them and cycle through every destination without stepping through
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Telekinetic Shockwave
achievements.description: Claim the Force Glyph from an effigy of Nuprator
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Through the Fallen Skull
achievements.description: Reach Nupraptor's Retreat
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Petrifying Earthquake
achievements.description: Claim the Stone Glyph from a hammer-wielding statue
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Stunning Sound Wave
achievements.description: Claim the Sound Glyph from a ringing bell
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Towering Walls and Deep Moats
achievements.description: Reach the Human Citadel
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: An Engulfing Water Wave
achievements.description: Claim the Water Glyph from a winged sculpture
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: An Incinerating Fiery Wave
achievements.description: Claim the Fire Glyph from a four-armed demon figure
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Defunct Beacon
achievements.description: Reach the Lighthouse
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: A Burning Flash of Light
achievements.description: Claim the Sunlight Glyph from a shadowy altar
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Baptized in the Primordial Flame
achievements.description: Imbue your Wraith Blade with fire, obtaining the Fire Reaver
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Eldritch Power-Up
achievements.description: Collect your first Eldritch energy power-up
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Maximum Eldritch Energy
achievements.description: Collect every Eldritch energy power-up
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Health Power-Up Piece
achievements.description: Collect your first health power-up piece
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Health Power-Up Emblem
achievements.description: Collect five health power-ups pieces, completing an emblem and increasing your health coil
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Maximum Health Coil
achievements.description: Collect every health power-up, maximizing your material manifestation
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Cast Him In
achievements.description: Kill a vampire as you were killed
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Hymn of Death
achievements.description: Recreate the cut conclusion of the story by activating the Sounding Pipes at the top of the Silenced Cathedral
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: A Warm Welcome
achievements.description: Have the guards at the entrance of the Human Citadel worship you
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Victim of the Elements
achievements.description: Kill a human without being blamed for it
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Kill It With Fire
achievements.description: Destroy all 20 Rahabim cocoons near the Fire Forge
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Room of Constraining Deadlines
achievements.description: Visit the room past a mural in the Tomb of the Sarafan
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Promethean Torture
achievements.description: Isolate a vampire and kill it five times in a row
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Otherworldly Art
achievements.description: Appreciate the mural in Nupraptor's Retreat from as close as possible
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Transylvanian Gentleman
achievements.description: Sip from a human's soul without killing them
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Put Them to the Torch
achievements.description: Kill two vampires using a single torch and without letting go of it
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Lestat's Craving
achievements.description: Witness a vampire die from voluntarily walking into sunlight
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Useless Lever
achievements.description: Collect the health power-up atop a fountain in the Human Citadel without opening the preceding gate
achievements.author: gde
